channel.title: Blog on Kiegan Rice
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Kiegan Rice

item.title: Let It (Randomly) Snow!
item.description: It’s that time of year in the Midwest; the first snowfalls of the year are here. Stubborn midwesterners (like me) are attempting to wait as long as possible before breaking out their winter coats. “It should still be fall, right? This snow is just an early aberration and things will warm up again!” Every few days, conversations are abuzz with the prospect of snow. And every so often, groans can be audibly heard across my apartment complex as people awake to find their cars covered in a light coat of ice and snow.

item.title: Hello blog!
item.description: Welcome to the data blog! I’m just now getting things set up, so this is a test post to make sure the blog is working alright. I’ll be creating posts driven by data visualization here in the following months. Here goes nothing! Test plot You can also embed plots. See Figure 1 for example: Figure 1: A test plot for the blog.
